name: Escape the Mazes
short_description: Escape the Mazes is a puzzle game where the player need to find the exit of differents mazes! Do you think you can find your way to escape the mazes?
detailed_description:
Escape the Mazes is a puzzle game where the player need to find the exit of differents mazes! Do you think you can find your way to escape the mazes?

Features:
- 25 handcrafted mazes.
- 1 bonus level : “The Impossible Maze”.
- More then 10 hours of gameplay.
- Great soundtrack with over 25 songs.
- Steam cards and achievements.

About the bonus level:
If you beat the 25 mazes, you will unlock “The Impossible Maze”. Try to beat this hardcore maze to earn a really rare Steam achievement and to enter the hall of fame of the game.
